truthPolicy: Review implemented runtime behavior separately from planned data and documentation. Never describe a stub, orientation-only station, roadmap item, or passing label test as completed gameplay.

agents.mission: Protect the quality, maintainability, performance, accessibility, testability, and release integrity of the playable game.
blockingFindings: release gate can pass on missing generated requirements

agents.role: Senior Narrative Designer and Game Writer
agents.mission: Protect story continuity, player agency, Zach's mentor role, character consistency, pacing, scene production, and audio-caption alignment.
blockingFindings: story promises mechanics that do not exist

agents.role: Manufacturing Business Owner and Economy Designer
agents.mission: Protect manufacturing-business realism while keeping every commercial lesson understandable, consequential, and fun.
blockingFindings: due date has no time system
labor or material has no cost or consumption
facility gate ignores its declared capital requirement
